summary: Stellar show with Jerry on fire and a crisp matrix mix (despite an early Crazy Fingers sync hiccup).
review: Fans rave about this 1982 performance, calling it a stacked show and praising Jerry Garcia’s tone. The matrix recording is generally clear and well‑balanced, though one reviewer noted a brief out‑of‑sync segment of “Crazy Fingers” that was later fixed.

ai_rating.rationale: Multiple 5‑star reviews highlight excellent playing and a good matrix mix; only one technical complaint about sync, which has been corrected, keeping the overall rating high.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Nice matrix sound with clear mix; original source had a 45‑second out‑of‑sync segment of “Crazy Fingers” that was later spliced and fixed.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers describe the set as stacked and flowing well, with strong energy throughout.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as sounding great; his tone praised by reviewers.
